impact: 340 APAC Tier-1/2 suppliers at elevated insolvency risk (Moody's). Disruption to critical single-source inputs.
mitigation: Run financial health screening on all critical vendors
Increase monitoring frequency for at-risk vendors

impact: Red Sea diversions add 10-14 days; capesize tightness raises ore/coal landed lead times. OTIF exposure on seaborne inputs.
mitigation: Increase safety stock for seaborne raw materials

impact: Grade-critical alloy and refractory quality variation can affect heat chemistry and yield.
mitigation: Tighten incoming quality inspection on alloys

impact: CBAM enforcement Oct 2026 + CSRD Scope 3; 28% rise in supplier carbon disclosure failures. Market-access and compliance exposure.
mitigation: Prioritise high-grade ore to cut emissions
Secure green power for CBAM-exposed exports

impact: US-China tariff escalation (60% prob Q3); concentration in single origins for ore, coal and alloys.
mitigation: Diversify coking coal origin beyond Australia
Model tariff impact on imported inputs
Review force majeure and tariff clauses

impact: Peer mills ramping output (Tata, JSW, SAIL) intensify competition for ore, coal, alloys and freight tonnage.
mitigation: Secure raw material ahead of demand ramp
Monitor peer cargo timing for signals
